narrative: Softer Fed rate hike bets trim early dollar gains as Waller reinforces inflation commitment — DXY steady +0.01% while gold retreats +0.00% near $4,165. AUD/JPY (+0.64% intraday) leads G10 performance on a 1.185% weekly scorecard spread, driven by the +335bp RBA-BoJ OIS carry advantage. USD/JPY holds at 162.05 with options pricing a notable premium over realized volatility (IV 7.2% vs HV30 3.3%), while equities rise +0.72% and VIX consolidates 15.6. Watch the RBNZ rate decision on July 8 at 02:00 UTC.
